untranslatable_reason: Signal requires order flow analysis (order flow patterns, bid-ask spreads), liquidity metrics, correlation regime detection, and options skew — none of which are available in the allowed indicator set. Pattern matching against historical episodes requires machine learning or external pattern recognition not supported by this engine. The 'pattern_confidence_threshold' (0.75) and 'confirming_signals_required' (3) cannot be operationalized with available indicators.
translation_notes: Partially translated using hvol_20 (20-day historical volatility) as a proxy for the volatility percentile trigger requirement. The 75th percentile condition was approximated as hvol_20 > 0.75 (75% volatility level in decimal form). Exit condition 'realized volatility exceeds implied by 20%' was approximated as hvol_20 < 0.20 (reversal). The three core entry conditions (order flow, liquidity withdrawal, spreads; volatility percentile; pattern matching) cannot be fully captured without additional market microstructure and ML-based indicators.
